heading: Other administrative authorities
label: 15109 Other administrative authorities
notes: Amendments2024—, which directed striking out “(a) In general.—”, was executed by striking out “(a) .—” before “The following provisions” in introductory provisions, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 118–159In General

children.text: Section 14518, relating to continuation of officers to complete disciplinary action.
Section 14519, relating to deferment of retirement or separation for medical reasons.
Section 14704, relating to the selective early removal from the reserve active-status list.
Section 14705, relating to the selective early retirement of reserve general and flag officers of the Navy and Marine Corps.
